content:
Hello World! Welcome to Deep N Wide. I’m excited to finally have this site up and running.
What to expect In the coming weeks, I’ll be sharing posts about:
Technology and web / game / any type of development Personal insights and stories Deep dives into interesting topics Stay tuned for more!
summary: Welcome to my new digital space where I’ll be sharing thoughts on…
title: Welcome to Deep N Wide

content:
Well, I use to update this blog once in a while - not more than a dozen times in an year. So it is overkill to use a standalone hosting and pay INR 4000+ for a WP blog in any of those popular hosting sites. Yeah…they all start their plans with less than INR 100 per month for their hosting but jumps to INR 300 per month upon renewal. Typical trap for customers…
I hope this will go on well. Let me end this post with an image I generated for some personal projects… :-)
summary: Some thoughts on WP hosting cost and alternate options…
title: Moving from Wordpress to Hugo and GitHub
